name: SNC Platform + Codex
onCreateCommand: sudo update-alternatives --set iptables /usr/sbin/iptables-nft && sudo update-alternatives --set ip6tables /usr/sbin/ip6tables-nft && (sudo pkill dockerd 2>/dev/null; while pgrep -x dockerd >/dev/null; do sleep 0.5; done; sudo rm -f /var/run/docker.pid; sudo service docker start)
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq ffmpeg caddy && npm install -g pm2 bun@1.3.12 && curl -fsSL https://chatgpt.com/codex/install.sh -o /tmp/codex-install.sh && CODEX_NON_INTERACTIVE=1 CODEX_INSTALL_DIR=/home/vscode/.local/bin sh /tmp/codex-install.sh && rm /tmp/codex-install.sh && if [ -d /workspaces/SNC/skills ]; then codex plugin marketplace add /workspaces/SNC/skills; else codex plugin marketplace add https://github.com/nklisch/skills; fi && codex plugin add agile-workflow@nklisch-skills && codex plugin add agentic-research@nklisch-skills && codex plugin add agent-coordination@nklisch-skills && bun install && bash scripts/dev/ensure-env.sh && pip install --user pre-commit && (git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && python3 -m pre_commit install || echo 'pre-commit install skipped: no usable git dir — workspace was opened from a submodule checkout, whose .git file points outside the mount. Dev works; commit from the enclosing checkout, or clone standalone for full git function.')
